title: pisum nigrum
intro: Pisum nigrum, also known as black mustard or charlock, is a plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pisum nigrum include its ability to aid digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. In terms of herbal preparations, Pisum nigrum can be consumed as a decoction, made by steeping the seeds or leaves in hot water, or used as a paste to apply topically for skin issues.
